title: Lift ATX
html:
Lift ATX

Lift ATX — the Austin gym Yahir picked over Iron Forge Gym TX during the Aug 2025 move-in. $50/mo membership, $25 to start. The gym he both lifts at and product-thinks about.

What we know

  • Pricing: $50/mo + $25 startup, named in the Aug 21 packlist as one of two finalist options.
  • Selected over Iron Forge Gym TX ($55/mo, sauna) — Yahir picked the cheaper option without sauna.
  • Active product feedback in 2025 12 20 how to make lift atx better: Yahir suggests TVs for promo updates, ads, and a website revamp — same operator-thinking he brings to Rankett.
  • Likely the gym Yahir uses for both his own training (per the long ISSA CPT / anabolic scoring arc) and for whatever overflow bridge income gym work he does outside NaviWell.

Open questions

  • Is this an independent gym or a small chain?
  • Owner / staff Yahir might pitch the website-revamp idea to?
  • Does Yahir actually have a gym job here, or is it strictly a member relationship?
  • 2026 status — did he stay or switch to Iron Forge / Planet Fitness?
